projects.name: xai-org/grok-build
projects.description: SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.
projects.description_cn: SpaceXAI 的编码代理线束和 TUI。全屏、鼠标交互、可扩展。

projects.name: pixel-point/aval
projects.description: A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.
projects.description_cn: 一种新的网络交互式视频开源格式，具有内置状态机、帧精确过渡和打包 Alpha 透明度。

projects.name: littledivy/mimic
projects.description: Intercept any app, then call it from Python like a library
projects.description_cn: 拦截任何应用程序，然后像库一样从 Python 调用它

projects.name: tandpfun/wardrobe
projects.description: Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.
projects.description_cn: 你的衣服，用 gpt-image 提取并组织。

projects.name: mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide
projects.description: Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software development.
projects.description_cn: 本地优先、零信任代理 IDE，用于可验证的自主软件开发。

projects.name: oil-oil/beautify-github-readme
projects.description: Design clear, theme-specific GitHub README homepages with SVG titles, real proof, and maintainable Markdown
projects.description_cn: 设计清晰、主题特定的 GitHub README 主页，其中包含 SVG 标题、真实证明和可维护的 Markdown

projects.name: Kappaemme-git/codex-first-customer-finder-skill
projects.description: A Codex skill that finds evidence-backed potential first customers from recent public signals.
projects.description_cn: 一种法典技能，可从最近的公共信号中找到有证据支持的潜在第一批客户。
